# JohnB.io

> A personal AI and development project site by John Bowman. Built to test, explore and showcase AI-powered tools, responsible AI frameworks, and developer utilities.

## Pages

- [Home](https://johnb.io/): Projects gallery — browse all tools and projects on the site.
- [About](https://johnb.io/about): Background, skills, and interests of John Bowman.

## AI Tools

- [AI CV Enhancer](https://johnb.io/aitocv): Upload a CV and job description to get a tailored CV, cover letter, match score and interview prep powered by Claude AI. Also accessible via aitocv.com.
- [AI Copyeditor](https://johnb.io/editor): Paste or upload text/Word documents to get AI-powered copyediting with UK/US English support and brand style guide options.
- [Gen Z Translator](https://johnb.io/genz): AI-powered tool that rewrites text in Gen Z slang.
- [LLM Chat](https://johnb.io/lm-chat): Side-by-side chat interface comparing Claude, OpenAI and Gemini responses to the same prompt in real time.
- [YouTube Blog Post Generator](https://johnb.io/transcripts): Paste a YouTube transcript and get an SEO-optimised blog post generated by AI.

## Developer Tools

- [iGaming Bonus Cost Calculator](https://johnb.io/bonus-calculator): Model the true cost of casino bonus offers. Enter bonus amount, wagering requirement, house edge and player completion rate to calculate net operator cost per bonus issued, breakeven house edge, and a scenario table across five completion rates.
- [iGaming RG Message Generator](https://johnb.io/rg-generator): Generate compliant responsible gambling disclaimers for 10 jurisdictions including UK (UKGC), Malta (MGA), Ontario, Netherlands, Sweden, Denmark, Germany, Ireland, Spain and Gibraltar. Provides copy-paste disclaimer text, required logos and seals, helpline details, self-exclusion scheme information and channel-specific guidance for email, display, social media and SMS.
- [iGaming Jargon Translator](https://johnb.io/igaming-jargon): AI-powered tool that translates iGaming industry terminology to plain English, or plain English descriptions to correct industry terminology. Covers GGR, NGR, RTP, wagering requirements, KYC/AML, CPA, RevShare, CLV, responsible gambling frameworks and more. Built for operators, affiliates, agencies and new starters.
- [iGaming Regulatory Compliance Map](https://johnb.io/igaming-compliance): Interactive world map of 203 iGaming regulations across 60+ jurisdictions. Browse gambling laws, AML directives, data protection rules and advertising codes by country — filterable by region and category.
- [eBay & Vinted Profit Calculator](https://johnb.io/ebay): Calculate profit from eBay and Vinted sales, accounting for platform fees, postage and purchase costs.
- [Bill Calculator](https://johnb.io/calculator): Split bills and calculate tips. Built with Python via Pyodide.
- [Poker Bankroll Planner](https://johnb.io/bankroll): Evaluate poker experience level and plan bankroll strategy.
- [YouTube Channel Analyzer](https://johnb.io/youtube-analyzer): Analyse YouTube channels by keyword — surface top creators, view counts and growth data.
- [Text to Voice](https://johnb.io/text-to-voice): Browser-based text-to-speech with voice selection, speed control and word-by-word subtitle highlighting.

## Digital AI Tools

- [Content Repurposer](https://johnb.io/content-repurposer): AI-powered tool that repurposes existing content into new formats — blog posts to LinkedIn articles, newsletters to social threads, and more.
- [iGaming Promo Copy Generator](https://johnb.io/promo-copy): Generate compliant iGaming promotional copy for 10 regulated markets including UK (UKGC), Malta (MGA), Ontario, Netherlands, Germany and more. Describe a promotion, select jurisdiction, channel and tone, and receive AI-generated headlines, body copy, call-to-action text, T&C summaries and market-specific required disclaimers.
- [LLMs.txt Generator](https://johnb.io/llms-generator): AI-powered tool that generates a structured llms.txt file from a URL or pasted content. Helps websites become more discoverable and accurately cited by AI assistants including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity. Follows the llmstxt.org specification.
- [Text to Speech Converter](https://johnb.io/text-to-speech): Convert text to natural-sounding speech and download as MP3. Powered by OpenAI TTS (tts-1 model) with six voice options (Alloy, Echo, Fable, Onyx, Nova, Shimmer) and adjustable playback speed. Up to 4,000 characters per conversion.

## News and Insights

- [News](https://johnb.io/news): News and insights on AI, iGaming, SEO and digital from John Bowman.
- [Claude Code VSC: AI Coding for Beginners](https://johnb.io/news/claude-code-vsc): Beginner's guide to the Claude Code VS Code extension by Anthropic. Covers what Claude Code VSC is, how it differs from Claude.ai, installation steps, what it can do, the CLAUDE.md briefing file, pricing (Claude Max subscription vs API credits), and what to try first.
- [AI in 2026: How Large Language Models Are Reshaping Search, Content and Work](https://johnb.io/news/test-ai): Covers how LLMs have shifted from novelty to infrastructure in 2026. Topics include Google AI Overviews and the impact on SEO, generative engine optimisation (GEO) and the llms.txt standard, AI use cases in writing, code and data analysis, AI applications and risks in iGaming across 50-plus jurisdictions, and what to watch in H2 2026 including AI agents, multimodal models and EU AI Act implementation. Includes FAQ schema, structured sources and internal links to related tools.

## AI Course

- [AI & Machine Learning Course](https://johnb.io/course-dashboard): Free AI and machine learning course with certificate. 9 units and 35 lessons covering AI fundamentals, deep learning, NLP, MLOps and business strategy. No login required to browse.
- [Final Exam](https://johnb.io/exam): 30-question randomised exam drawn from a 60-question bank covering all 9 units.

### Unit 1 — Introduction to AI
- [What Is AI? History, Definitions and the Turing Test](https://johnb.io/course/what-is-ai): Covers AI history from the 1950s, Alan Turing's 1950 test, AI winters, and why modern AI is pattern matching at scale.
- [Categories of AI: Narrow, General and Super AI](https://johnb.io/course/categories-of-ai): Explains the three tiers of AI capability — narrow AI (what exists today), AGI (theoretical), and ASI (hypothetical).
- [How AI Learns: Supervised, Unsupervised and Reinforcement Learning](https://johnb.io/course/how-ai-learns): The three core learning paradigms that power modern AI systems.
- [AI vs Augmented Intelligence](https://johnb.io/course/ai-vs-augmented-intelligence): Explores the distinction between AI replacing humans and AI enhancing human decision-making.

### Unit 2 — AI Landscape
- [Traditional AI vs Generative AI](https://johnb.io/course/traditional-vs-generative-ai): How rules-based and statistical AI differs from modern generative models.
- [ML, Deep Learning and Neural Networks](https://johnb.io/course/ml-deep-learning-neural-networks): The relationship between machine learning, deep learning and neural networks explained clearly.
- [Key AI Subfields](https://johnb.io/course/key-ai-subfields): NLP, computer vision, robotics, and other major branches of AI.
- [AI Tools and Platforms in 2026](https://johnb.io/course/ai-tools-platforms-2026): Overview of the leading AI tools and platforms available to practitioners in 2026.

### Unit 3 — AI Ethics and Governance
- [AI Failures and Ethics](https://johnb.io/course/ai-failures-ethics): Real-world AI failures and the ethical lessons they teach.
- [Hallucinations, Bias and IP](https://johnb.io/course/ai-hallucinations-bias-ip): Why AI systems hallucinate, how bias enters models, and intellectual property considerations.
- [AI Governance Frameworks](https://johnb.io/course/ai-governance-frameworks): How organisations and regulators are approaching AI governance, including the EU AI Act.

### Unit 4 — Python for AI
- [Python Essentials for AI](https://johnb.io/course/python-essentials-for-ai): The Python concepts and syntax you need before working with AI libraries.
- [NumPy and Pandas](https://johnb.io/course/numpy-pandas): Core data manipulation libraries for AI and machine learning workflows.

### Unit 5 — Machine Learning Fundamentals
- [Linear Regression and Gradient Descent](https://johnb.io/course/linear-regression-gradient-descent): How linear regression works and how gradient descent optimises model parameters.
- [Logistic Regression and Classification](https://johnb.io/course/logistic-regression-classification): Binary and multi-class classification with logistic regression.
- [Model Evaluation](https://johnb.io/course/model-evaluation): Accuracy, precision, recall, F1, confusion matrices and ROC curves explained.
- [Key ML Algorithms](https://johnb.io/course/key-ml-algorithms): Decision trees, random forests, SVMs, k-nearest neighbours and when to use each.

### Unit 6 — Deep Learning
- [Biological vs Artificial Neurons](https://johnb.io/course/biological-vs-artificial-neurons): How biological neurons inspired the design of artificial neural networks.
- [Neural Networks and Forward Propagation](https://johnb.io/course/neural-networks-forward-propagation): How data flows through a neural network layer by layer.
- [Backpropagation](https://johnb.io/course/backpropagation): How neural networks learn by propagating error signals backwards through layers.
- [Activation Functions and the Vanishing Gradient](https://johnb.io/course/activation-functions-vanishing-gradient): ReLU, sigmoid, tanh and why the vanishing gradient problem matters.
- [TensorFlow, PyTorch and Keras](https://johnb.io/course/tensorflow-pytorch-keras): Comparison of the major deep learning frameworks and when to use each.
- [CNNs with Keras](https://johnb.io/course/cnns-with-keras): Convolutional neural networks explained and built with Keras.
- [RNNs, Transformers and Autoencoders](https://johnb.io/course/rnns-transformers-autoencoders): Sequence models, the transformer architecture, and autoencoder networks.

### Unit 7 — Generative AI and LLMs
- [Generative AI Models](https://johnb.io/course/generative-ai-models): VAEs, GANs and diffusion models — how generative AI creates new content.
- [Prompt Engineering and AI Agents](https://johnb.io/course/prompt-engineering-ai-agents): How to write effective prompts and how AI agents differ from chatbots.
- [RAG, Fine-tuning and Enterprise AI](https://johnb.io/course/rag-finetuning-enterprise-ai): Retrieval-augmented generation vs fine-tuning for enterprise use cases.

### Unit 8 — MLOps
- [Intro to MLOps](https://johnb.io/course/intro-to-mlops): What MLOps is and why the gap between notebook experiments and production systems matters.
- [Model Deployment](https://johnb.io/course/model-deployment): Serving ML models via APIs, batch vs real-time prediction, and Docker containers.
- [Monitoring and Drift](https://johnb.io/course/monitoring-drift): Data drift, concept drift and how to detect when models degrade in production.
- [CI/CD for ML](https://johnb.io/course/cicd-for-ml): Continuous integration and deployment pipelines for machine learning systems.

### Unit 9 — AI in Business
- [AI Adoption Journey](https://johnb.io/course/ai-adoption-journey): The stages organisations go through when adopting AI, from experimentation to transformation.
- [Build vs Buy](https://johnb.io/course/build-vs-buy): When to build custom AI systems and when to buy off-the-shelf products.
- [AI Across Industries](https://johnb.io/course/ai-across-industries): How AI is actually being deployed in healthcare, finance, marketing and manufacturing.
- [Making the Business Case for AI](https://johnb.io/course/business-case-for-ai): How to pitch AI projects to decision makers using financial metrics and specific problem framing.

## Responsible AI

- [RAI Governance Framework](https://johnb.io/rai): Interactive responsible AI governance tool covering principles, risk tiering (EU AI Act aligned), RAI checklists, system cards and an AI registry.

## Insights & Data

- [Website Insights](https://johnb.io/project-insights): Google PageSpeed and performance insights for the site.

## Other

- [Recipe Collection](https://johnb.io/recipes): A personal recipe collection.
- [12-Week Cholesterol Protocol](https://johnb.io/wo): A 12-week exercise and nutrition protocol aimed at improving cholesterol levels.

## Site Info

- Owner: John Bowman
- Contact: ukjbowman@gmail.com
- Built with: Vanilla HTML, CSS and JavaScript. AI features powered by Claude (Anthropic) API.
- Purpose: Personal test site for AI tools and development projects.
